title: Tree Stump Killer Root Killer Prfessional Roundup Tree Stump & Root Killer 250ml
features: Roundup Tree Stump Weed Killer 250ml Tree Stump & Root Killer Up To 16 Stumps
Kills stumps, trees, brambles, nettles, deep rooted and woody weeds.
Kills Tough Weeds to the roots.

Roundup stump killer is a non-selective, translocated weedkiller that is absorbed by leaves and freshly cut, woody surfaces and moves throughout the entire plant, above and below the ground, to control standing coniferous and deciduous trees, newly cut tree stumps, tree saplings, brambles, bracken, Nettles, Japanese knotweed and other tough and woody weeds.
description: Product Description Roundup Stump Killer. 250ml New Formula Super Concentrate. Kills stumps, trees, brambles, nettles, deep rooted and woody weeds. Kills Tough Weeds to the roots. Kills up to 16 Stumps. Roundup stump killer is a non-selective, translocated weedkiller that is absorbed by leaves and freshly cut, woody surfaces and moves throughout the entire plant, above and below the ground, to control standing coniferous and deciduous trees, newly cut tree stumps, tree saplings, brambles, bracken, Nettles, Japanese knotweed and other tough and woody weeds. It will also kill grasses and other weeds including deep rooted perennials. Roundup stump killer is degraded by micro-organisums in the soil. Directions Apply the product on freshly cut tree stumps and woody surfaces, ensuring it's absorbed for effective results. Follow other safety instructions as indicated on the product packaging. For stump removal, apply directly to the stump, ensuring the product is absorbed. One 250ml bottle can treat up to 16 stumps, depending on their size. Safety Warning Apply the product on freshly cut tree stumps and woody surfaces, and ensure it's absorbed for effective results. Follow other safety instructions as indicated on the product packaging.
